content.body:
Add verbose/concise/caveman mode step to the onboarding wizard between
language and profile selection. Wire Mode field through OnboardingResult
to config.yaml generation.

Fix generated CLAUDE.md boot sequence to use `boot: true` field instead
of loading by type, aligning with the self-hosting CLAUDE.md behavior.

Closes #30, closes #31

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add mode selection to onboarding + fix boot sequence in generated CLAUDE.md
content.summary:
